Name: Starting Room
Description: You are in a small stone room. The walls are damp and the air smells of moss. You see an exit to the north.

Name: Long Hallway
Description: A long dark corridor stretching from north to south. To the east are dust-covered doors. A narrow passage leads west.

Name: Old Library
Description: A room filled with ancient books. Dust covers every surface. An old sage stands in the corner studying scrolls.

Name: Sage's Study
Description: A small study filled with magical artifacts and bubbling potions. Strange symbols glow on the walls.

Name: Dark Cavern
Description: A vast underground cavern with stalactites hanging from the ceiling. Water drips somewhere in the darkness. Paths lead east and down.

Name: Underground Lake
Description: A serene underground lake reflects your torchlight. A small boat is tied to a wooden dock. The only way out is up.

Name: Treasure Chamber
Description: A magnificent chamber with a chest in the center. Gold coins sparkle in the torchlight. This is the goal of your journey!

Name: Secret Passage
Description: A hidden corridor behind the treasure chamber. Ancient torches line the walls, still burning after centuries.

Name: Ancient Altar
Description: A mysterious stone altar covered in forgotten runes. A powerful energy emanates from this sacred place.
